title: Cairns, Queensland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Cairns, Queensland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Cairns is a city in Queensland with a population of 169,312. Gateway to the Great Barrier Reef and Daintree Rainforest with a vibrant tourism and backpacker scene.

Last updated: July 10, 2026
